name: Jerk Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large glass or ceramic bowl, combine ground allspice, dried thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, ground sage, grated nutmeg, cinnamon, salt, garlic powder, and sugar.
2. Slowly whisk in soya sauce, vinegar, orange juice. Whisk in olive oil in a slow stream.
3. Add minced onion and green onions. Mix well.
4. Add chicken and allow to marinate for 1 hour at room temperature or overnight, covered in the refrigerator.
5. If using an outdoor grill, toss 1 or 2 bay leaves onto the coals.
6. Grill chicken for 6 minutes on each side. Alternatively, broil indoors for 5-6 minutes on each side, brushing well with the marinade while cooking.
7. For a hotter flavor, double the amounts of the first seven ingredients.
